info.description: API for Capy RPI Club Assistant
info.title: Capy API

get.description: Redirects to Google OAuth consent screen
Handles the OAuth callback from Google
Returns the currently authenticated user's profile
Redirects to Microsoft OAuth consent screen
Handles the OAuth callback from Microsoft

post.description: Issues a new JWT token if the current one is valid

get.description: Returns information about the current bot token. Authenticate with X-Bot-Token: <token_id>.<secret>, for example: curl -H 'X-Bot-Token: <token>' http://localhost:8080/api/v1/bot/me

post.description: Creates a new organization for the authenticated bot and links it to the provided Discord guild ID.

get.description: Returns organization details for the provided Discord guild ID.
Returns all bot tokens (requires dev role)

post.description: Creates a new bot token (requires dev role). The raw token is returned only once and must be stored by the caller.

delete.description: Revokes a bot token (requires dev role)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all public events

post.description: Creates a new event for an organization

get.description: Returns all events hosted by a specific organization
Returns event details

put.description: Updates event details. Requires event_admin role.

delete.description: Deletes an event. Requires event_admin role.

post.description: Registers the current user or a specified user for an event

delete.description: Removes registration for the current user or a specified user

get.description: Returns all users registered for an event

post.description: Creates a new dynamic link for an organization. Requires org_admin role.

put.description: Updates a dynamic link's destination or endpoint URL. Requires org_admin role.

get.description: Generates and returns a QR code image for the link's destination URL
Returns the total number of visits logged for a link
Returns a paginated list of all organizations

post.description: Creates a new organization. The creator becomes an admin.

get.description: Returns organization details

put.description: Updates organization details. Requires org_admin role.

delete.description: Deletes an organization. Requires org_admin role.

get.description: Returns all events hosted by an organization
Returns all dynamic links owned by an organization
Returns all members of an organization

post.description: Adds a user as a member of an organization

delete.description: Removes a user from an organization

get.description: Redirects to the destination URL and logs a visit
Retrieves a user's profile

put.description: Updates a user's profile. Only role changes require the caller to have the dev role.

delete.description: Deletes a user account. Users can only delete their own account.

get.description: Returns all events the user is registered for
Returns all organizations the user is a member of

uid.description: For bot to register on behalf of user
